one_line: Last Mauryan king Brihadratha and general Pushyamitra Shunga at the fraught end of the Maurya Empire, c. 185 BCE.

appearance.age_look: Brihadratha: early 40s, lean but regal; Pushyamitra: late 40s, broad-shouldered, battle-hardened
appearance.face: Both with oval faces and medium-brown North Indian complexions; Brihadratha has sharp, refined features, straight nose, neatly trimmed short beard and calm, thoughtful eyes with a slightly burdened expression; Pushyamitra has stronger jaw, thicker eyebrows, clean-shaven face, faint battle scar across his left cheek and an intense, assessing gaze; default expression shows Brihadratha composed yet weary beside Pushyamitra alert and resolute.
appearance.hair: Brihadratha’s straight black hair is oiled and tied in a modest topknot at the back of the crown, with a single thin lock falling in front of the right ear; no crown, only a narrow gold circlet hugging the head; Pushyamitra’s hair is slightly wavy, dark and pulled into a tight high knot at the back, with a short fringe and temple-length side locks, wrapped at the base with a dull red cloth band.
appearance.costume: Brihadratha wears a Mauryan court-style antariya (wrapped lower garment) in rich deep indigo cotton, pleated in front and falling to the ankles, secured with a broad gold-embroidered belt, paired with a long-sleeved, close-fitting light cream cotton uttariya (upper cloth) draped from left shoulder across the torso and back; he has simple but fine gold armlets, a single medium-length gold necklace with a small circular pendant, and thin gold bangles; his feet are in plain dark brown leather sandals. Pushyamitra wears a practical soldier’s antariya in muted earthy red-brown, hitched at the knees for movement, and a sleeveless fitted dark olive-green cotton tunic over it, with a lighter ochre sash tied firmly around his waist; he has a sturdy leather chest harness holding his scabbard strap, bronze armguards on his forearms, and simple iron finger rings; his sandals are thicker, dark brown leather with visible straps; textiles are matte cotton and leather with minimal patterning, only subtle border stripes on Brihadratha’s garments.
appearance.signature: Brihadratha carries a rolled palm-leaf manuscript bundle tied with a thin red cord as his constant prop, while Pushyamitra carries a single straight-edged iron sword with a simple bronze hilt and slightly worn wooden scabbard hanging at his left hip.

ref_desc: Brihadratha and Pushyamitra stand together, Brihadratha in deep indigo antariya and cream uttariya with gold circlet and manuscript bundle, Pushyamitra in earthy red-brown antariya, dark olive tunic, red cloth hair band and iron sword at his hip.
sheet_prompt: Draw a full-body anime-style model sheet of two North Indian men from c.185 BCE standing side by side: Brihadratha is lean, early-40s, with an oval medium-brown face, neatly trimmed short beard, composed yet weary eyes, and straight black hair tied in a modest topknot with one thin lock before his right ear, wearing a narrow gold circlet; he is dressed in a Mauryan court deep indigo wrapped antariya to the ankles, pleated in front and held with a broad gold-embroidered belt, and a long-sleeved, fitted light cream upper cloth draped from his left shoulder across his torso, with simple gold armlets, a single medium gold necklace, thin bangles and plain dark brown leather sandals, holding a rolled palm-leaf manuscript bundle tied with a red cord in one hand. Beside him, Pushyamitra is late-40s, broad-shouldered, with an oval medium-brown face, strong jaw, thick brows, a faint scar on his left cheek and an intense gaze; his slightly wavy dark hair is pulled into a tight high knot at the back with short fringe and side locks, wrapped with a dull red cloth band at the base. He wears a practical soldier’s outfit: earthy red-brown antariya hitched at the knees, a sleeveless fitted dark olive-green cotton tunic, an ochre sash at the waist, leather chest harness crossing his torso, bronze armguards, simple iron rings and sturdy dark brown strapped sandals; an iron sword with a plain bronze hilt rests in a slightly worn wooden scabbard hanging at his left hip. Show them front-facing in clear anime styling, emphasizing the deep indigo, cream, earthy red-brown, dark olive-green and gold colour palette and making all face, hair, costume and weapon details crisp and repeatable.
